Name: Willis Towers Watson PLC
Description: Willis Towers Watson PLC (WTW) is a premier global advisory, broking, and solutions firm specializing in risk management, insurance, and consulting services. Operating in over 140 countries, WTW combines advanced data analytics and innovative technology to provide customized solutions in critical areas such as health, retirement, and talent management. Serving a wide array of clients from multinational corporations to smaller businesses, WTW is committed to driving sustainable growth and enhancing client engagement, positioning itself as a trusted advisor in a complex and rapidly changing market environment. Its strategic initiatives aim to address the evolving needs of clients, solidifying its role as a leader in the industry.
Address: 51 LIME STREET, LONDON, UNITED KINGDOM, EC3M 7DQ
